messages.content:
**📊 Stock Market Update — Wed, April 29, 2026 (UTC)**

---

**Market Snapshot**

| Index | Status | Close |
|---|---|---|
| **S&P 500** | ↓ 0.1–0.2% | ~7,120–7,140 |
| **Nasdaq** | ↓ 0.9% (Tue) / Mixed | ~24,600–24,700 |
| **Dow Jones** | ↓ 0.1% | 49,141.93 |

---

**Key Drivers Today**

- **Tech/AI selloff** — OpenAI missed revenue and user targets (WSJ report), sparking profit-taking. CFO raised concerns about ability to pay computing contracts. Chip stocks dropped ~3% (SMH ETF).
- **Oil surge** — Geopolitical risk (Iran war tensions) pushing oil prices higher, weighing on broader sentiment.
- **Fed meeting** — Market awaiting Wednesday's Fed decision; caution is high.
- **Iran geopolitics** — Reports Trump is unhappy with Iran's proposal to end the war / reopen Hormuz Strait.

---

**Notable Movers**

- ✅ **Coca-Cola (KO)** +4% — Earnings beat
- ❌ **Nvidia (NVDA)** -1%
- ❌ **Broadcom (AVGO)** -4%
- ❌ **AMD** -3%
- ❌ **Oracle (ORCL)** -4%
- ❌ **VanEck Semiconductor (SMH)** -3%

---

**What's Coming Up**

- **Big Tech earnings this week** — Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft all reporting. These will be major market movers.
- **Fed rate decision** — Expected to keep rates on hold; focus on Powell's guidance.

---

**🎯 CFO Insight**

The AI sentiment shift is the biggest risk right now. If Magnificent 7 earnings disappoint, expect further pressure on tech/semiconductor names. Oil-driven inflation risk + Fed caution = **defensive posture is warranted**. Watch the Fed statement for rate cut timeline signals — that'll be the next big catalyst.

**Next action:** Monitor Thur/Fri earnings closely. If Big Tech delivers, markets could recover quickly. If not, brace for further downside.

---
💰 *Digit 💰 — CFO, Kutraa Information Technology*
